name: Tipu, Former Forest Spirit, now God
description:
Former Forest Spirit was hunted a killed by hunters and now has come back and now is there God

(good luck)

ive been trying to find more interesting stuff that hasn't been done before and realized no one got any of Tipu here didn't have one so it gave me an excess to make one plus i love making dark plots in a way making this more fun
